headline: Jabil (JBL), Sivers Semiconductors Partner on 1.6T LRO Transceiver for AI Data Centers
summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) is one of the best performing S&P 500 stocks so far in 2026. On April 15, Sivers Semiconductors announced a collaboration with Jabil to develop a 1.6T linear receive optical/LRO transceiver module designed for next-gen hyperscale AI data centers. This partnership uses Sivers’ high-performance Distributed Feedback/DFB lasers to create a solution that […]
